multiple.vs_history: 5y median ≈ 14×; peer Ibiden / Shinko ≈ 22×; we use 18× as gap-closing

price_target.kill_condition: If Q3 法說會 downgrades H2-FY26 from 「滿載」 to 「可控」 → cut to half. Two consecutive softer quarters → exit.

A_ai_exposure.note: AI/HPC ABF mix estimated 28–32% of FY26 revenue, rising. Confirm at next 法說會.

B_order_visibility.note: Target ★★★★ once H2 滿載 language + Phase-2 capex receipts confirmed by analyst.

C_growth_potential.note: 5y rev CAGR draft 22%; CoWoS expansion run-rate at TSMC + advanced-package take-off.

D_cheap_to_fair.note: Auto-computed from PT vs price; gated by cycle multiplier (cycle.json).

E_increasing_moat.note: Capacity is moat. Phase-2 expansion confirmed = moat-widening (pending analyst).

F_revaluation.note: Mix-shift + margin step-up are the two primary 重估 levers; 3-of-5 receipts target.

order_visibility.kill: Q3 法說會 H2 utilization language drops from 「滿載」 to 「可控」 → cut half. Two consecutive softer quarters → exit.

mechanism.en: [DRAFT ≥600 words required] ABF substrate is the bottleneck layer in CoWoS advanced packaging — every NVIDIA H100/H200/B100/B200, AMD MI300/MI325/MI350, AWS Trainium and a growing set of hyperscaler ASICs ships on a substrate Unimicron, Ibiden, or Shinko produced. Dollar content per AI accelerator package runs in the $80–$140 range depending on layer count and area, materially above traditional FCBGA at $15–$30. Quantify Unimicron addressable share by capacity weeks vs total industry and project AI/HPC mix from current ~30% to 45%+ by FY28 as Phase-2 ramps and competitor (Ibiden) capacity is structurally constrained. Cite TSMC CoWoS capacity targets and back-derive substrate demand at 1:1.

moat_widening.en: [DRAFT] Capacity is the moat — Ibiden/Shinko constrained by Japanese capex discipline, Korean entrants (LG Innotek, Samsung Electro-Mechanics) 2+ years behind on advanced ABF metrology and yield. Phase-2 expansion compounds the lead. Quantify capacity share trajectory FY25 → FY28.

revaluation_thesis.en: [DRAFT] Market still prices Unimicron as a PC-cycle PCB maker on ~14× 5-year median. AI/HPC mix shift from ~10% (FY23) to projected 45%+ (FY28) + structural OP-margin step-up from low-teens to high-teens = multiple re-rating from 14× toward Ibiden/Shinko ~22× peer. Our 18× is gap-closing, not gap-erasing.

kill_condition.en: Hyperscaler capex digestion + Korean ABF advanced capacity online concurrent. If both, the capacity moat compresses faster than mix shift can lift margins. Single-quarter softness alone is not a kill — pattern over two quarters is.

if_kill_then.en: Cut to half on first softer-quarter signal. Move proceeds to test (2449 KYEC) which runs on shipped-units, not capex.
